debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : Fin n → ℝ
⊢ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i + x j|

apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro j _
  exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt (abs_sub_le_iff.mpr ⟨by linarith [abs_add (x i) (x j)], by linarith [abs_add (x i) (x j)]⟩)

apply Finset.sum_le_sum

  intro j _

apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro j _
  have h₁ : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
    cases' le_total 0 (x i + x j) with h h <;>
    cases' le_total 0 (x i - x j) with h₂ h₂ <;>
    cases' le_total 0 (x i) with h₃ h₃ <;>
    cases' le_total 0 (x j) with h₄ h₄ <;>
    simp_all only [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos] <;>
    nlinarith
  exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt (abs_nonneg _) h₁
